subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lemba nsansawilo pa mutwe wa kyobe-kyobe.
topics: Luno lufunjisho lwaimena pa kuleta buyuke bwa misango ya byanembwa ne kwi
Mutwe-kache 2 : Mabanyo a misango ya bya nembewa.
Kamina: luno lufunjisho lwayimena pa kutala pa kusala, kulondolola ne kupana
